truthPolicy: A visual-ready machine has all four floor states. Only VMC and restroom maintenance are currently mechanically playable; remaining records are orientation-ready until their failure loops ship.

equipment.fault: Blade wear, drive fault, or coolant loss
equipment.preventiveTask: Inspect blade tension, guides, guards, and coolant
equipment.returnToServiceCheck: Guard closed; dry-cycle and square-cut check pass

equipment.fault: Lubrication, belt, way, or spindle fault
equipment.preventiveTask: Lock out, inspect lubrication, belt, ways, and fasteners
equipment.returnToServiceCheck: Guards restored; spindle and axis checks pass

equipment.fault: Wheel wear, damaged guard, or extraction fault
equipment.preventiveTask: Inspect wheel, rests, guards, cords, and extraction
equipment.returnToServiceCheck: Guard and tool-rest gap verified before spin test

equipment.fault: Spindle, lubrication, coolant, servo, or probe fault
equipment.preventiveTask: Review alarms, lock out, inspect spindle systems, ways, coolant, and toolchanger
equipment.returnToServiceCheck: Panels closed; warm-up, reference return, and test cut pass

equipment.fault: Chuck, turret, spindle, lubrication, or servo fault
equipment.preventiveTask: Lock out and inspect chuck, turret, lubrication, guarding, and chip control
equipment.returnToServiceCheck: Guard closed; chuck-pressure, home, and test-turn checks pass

equipment.fault: Optics, calibration, spindle, or communication fault
equipment.preventiveTask: Clean optics, inspect spindle, verify calibration artifact and connections

equipment.fault: Reader, lock, inventory sensor, or terminal fault
equipment.preventiveTask: Inspect reader, locks, network, cabinet and inventory sensors
equipment.returnToServiceCheck: Badge, checkout, return, and inventory reconciliation pass

equipment.fault: Power, switch, agent, cabling, or telemetry fault
equipment.preventiveTask: Inspect power, cable strain relief, ports, cooling and agent health
equipment.returnToServiceCheck: Machine heartbeat and data-quality checks pass

equipment.fault: Display, input, power, network, or software fault
equipment.preventiveTask: Inspect power, display, input device, mount and network connection
equipment.returnToServiceCheck: Login, handoff entry, sync, and acknowledgement pass

equipment.fault: Protective stop, joint, gripper, sensor, or safety fault
equipment.preventiveTask: Lock out cell and inspect joints, tooling, guarding, sensors, and cables
equipment.returnToServiceCheck: Safety circuit, reduced-speed dry cycle, and recovery checks pass

equipment.fault: Battery, lidar, wheel, localization, or fleet fault
equipment.preventiveTask: Isolate motion and inspect battery, wheels, sensors, bumpers, and route data
equipment.returnToServiceCheck: Safety scan, localization, docking, and supervised route pass

facilityAssets.fault: Fixture, drain, supply, or service-availability fault
facilityAssets.preventiveTask: Close area, isolate the affected fixture, clear obstruction, inspect supply and sanitation
facilityAssets.returnToServiceCheck: Leak, flush, drain, sanitation, and reopening checks pass
